Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 63 

DRVD_DRG_CD 

LABEL: Derived MS-Diagnosis Related Group Code (MS-DRG) 

DESCRIPTION: The Medicare Severity diagnostic related group (MS-DRG) to which a hospital claim belongs for 
prospective payment purposes that is derived by the Encounter Data Processing System (EDPS). 

SHORT NAME: 

LONG NAME: 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 4 

SOURCE: Encounter Data System (EDS) 

FILE(S): IP base
